_instructions: mcporter routes MCP server connections for OpenClaw. Copy this to your mcporter config location (run 'mcporter config path' to find it). Replace all YOUR_* placeholders. Remove any server blocks you don't need.
_mcporter_config_location: Run 'mcporter config path' to find where this file should live on your system.
_fix_note_2026-03-11: BREAKING FIX: The desktop-commander entry previously used 'command: desktop-commander, args: [serve]' — that package name does not resolve via npx and causes all desktop-commander tool calls to fail with 'Tool not found'. The correct invocation is 'npx -y @wonderwhy-er/desktop-commander@latest' as shown below. Additionally, the neural-memory module path was corrected from 'neural_memory.mcp_server' to 'neural_memory.mcp' — the old path causes a ModuleNotFoundError on launch. Both errors cause silent MCP tool failures with no obvious crash.

desktop-commander._comment: File system and terminal access for the AI. IMPORTANT: package name is @wonderwhy-er/desktop-commander — do NOT use 'desktop-commander' as the command, it does not resolve. See fix note above.

neural-memory._comment: Local SQLite knowledge graph. Layer 3 of the Adam Framework. Required for full memory functionality. Module path is neural_memory.mcp — NOT neural_memory.mcp_server (old path causes ModuleNotFoundError).

gemini._comment: Google Gemini — text, vision, document analysis. Used by the nightly sleep cycle (reconcile_memory.py). Optional for general use.

firecrawl._comment: Web scraping and content extraction. Recommended replacement for built-in web search. Get a free key at firecrawl.dev

openrouter._comment: Routes tasks to other AI models (DeepSeek, GPT-4o, Claude, Llama, etc). Optional — useful for sub-agent orchestration.

_adding_more_servers: Search npm for 'mcp-server' to find community MCP servers for Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, and more. Any MCP-compatible server can be added here.
_security_note: Never commit this file with real API keys. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.
